fast_queue: Full range of features, except Fast queue
quick_reminder: As a quick reminder, your paid credit received each month will be valid for 60 days from the date they are issued. Utilize it to the fullest before it expires :)

thank_choosing: Thank you for choosing our service! We've added
subscription_resumed: Your subscription has been resumed for account <0>{{userEmail}}</0>, we will not charge you the next month from <0>{{start}} to {{end}}.</0>
resumed_yearly: Your subscription has been resumed for account <0>{{userEmail}}</0>Enjoy 20% off your next billing cycle.
enjoy_free_month: <0>Your subscription is active again! Join creators who've earned over six figures using Dream Clip.</0> Your next month of clipping is on us!
enjoy_20_off: Your subscription has been resumed. Enjoy 20% off your next billing cycle.
trial_note: Try the full range of features before deciding which plan is right for you. After {{expireDays}} days, you won't be charged unless you choose to upgrade.
you_are_browsi: You are browsing the history of this clip. Hover to see more details.
please_save_yo:
Please save your secret key in a safe place. Anyone with your API key can make requests
            on your behalf. It is only visible to account owners, team members will not be able to
            access it.
by_deleting_my: By deleting my account, I understand that:
once_you_delete:
Once you delete your account, your data, files, projects, and compositions will be
                gone forever.
once_you_leave: Once you leave the team, you’ll no longer be able to view any of the projects you created under this team account.
you_team_settings: You team settings have been updated
max_seats_reached: Max seats reached for your team.
invite_people_to_join: Invite people to join the team
invite_people:
Invite people to your team so you can share, edit and collaborate with them. You team
        members will be able to:

once_a_new_link: Once a new link is generated, the previous link will be deactivated and no longer work.
submit_project: Submit project using the credits under your account
are_you_sure: Are you sure you want to disband this team?

join_as_affiliate: Get paid to share Dream Clip
affiliate_description: You have been selected to join our affiliate program! Share Dream Clip and earn a 25% recurring commission through the first year of every new subscriber you refer. Sign up and get your affiliate link now!
question: Question
only_letters: Only letters, numbers and spaces are allowed
this_action_will: This action will immediately remove your personal data, files and projects.
your_active_subscription: Your active subscription will be canceled immediately and there will be no refund.
unused_credits: Unused credits will be expired and can not be restored.
if_you_are: If you are a team owner, your team workspace will be disbanded if you delete your account.
you_will_not: You won't be able to register for a free trial again with this sign-in method.
we_have_lost: We've lost your account connection. <0>Re-authenticate</0> to avoid scheduled post failure.
in_order_to: In order to post on Youtube, you'll need to have a channel first.  <0>Learn how</0> or check our <1>help center</1>.  Log in with the Google account that owns your YouTube channel to ensure Dream Clip connects correctly
select_all_layout_options: Select all layout options that can be used for the entire clip. When multiple options are selected, the AI will auto apply layouts based on scene detection.
recommend_saving_before_switching: To ensure your changes are saved, we recommend saving the clip before switching to a different aspect ratio.

ai_finds_copyright_free: AI finds copyright free stock B-Roll for you
add_voiceovers_multilang: Add natural voice-overs in various voices & languages
smart_ai_emojis_caption: Smart AI emojis for more expressive captions
auto_highlight_keywords: Automatically highlights key words for better clarity
one_click_audio_visual_boost: Make your audio clearer and your visuals more appealing in just one click. Enhance your speech, add AI B-Roll, and more.
